27	def build_parser() -> argparse.ArgumentParser:
28	    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description='Python porting workspace for the Claude Code rewrite effort')
29	    subparsers = parser.add_subparsers(dest='command', required=True)
30	    subparsers.add_parser('summary', help='render a Markdown summary of the Python porting workspace')
31	    subparsers.add_parser('manifest', help='print the current Python workspace manifest')
32	    subparsers.add_parser('parity-audit', help='compare the Python workspace against the local ignored TypeScript archive when available')
33	    subparsers.add_parser('setup-report', help='render the startup/prefetch setup report')
34	    subparsers.add_parser('command-graph', help='show command graph segmentation')
35	    subparsers.add_parser('tool-pool', help='show assembled tool pool with default settings')
36	    subparsers.add_parser('bootstrap-graph', help='show the mirrored bootstrap/runtime graph stages')

39	
40	    commands_parser = subparsers.add_parser('commands', help='list mirrored command entries from the archived snapshot')

141	def resolve_chat_prompt(args: argparse.Namespace, parser: argparse.ArgumentParser) -> str:
142	    if args.prompt:
143	        return args.prompt
144	    prompt = sys.stdin.read().strip()
145	    if prompt:
146	        return prompt
147	    command_name = getattr(args, 'command', 'command')
148	    parser.error(f'{command_name} requires a prompt argument or stdin input')
149	    raise AssertionError('unreachable')
150	
151	
152	def main(argv: list[str] | None = None) -> int:
153	    parser = build_parser()
154	    args = parser.parse_args(argv)
155	    manifest = build_port_manifest()
156	    if args.command == 'summary':
157	        print(QueryEnginePort(manifest).render_summary())
158	        return 0
159	    if args.command == 'manifest':
160	        print(manifest.to_markdown())
161	        return 0
162	    if args.command == 'parity-audit':
163	        print(run_parity_audit().to_markdown())
164	        return 0
165	    if args.command == 'setup-report':
166	        print(run_setup().as_markdown())
167	        return 0
168	    if args.command == 'command-graph':
169	        print(build_command_graph().as_markdown())
170	        return 0
171	    if args.command == 'tool-pool':
172	        print(assemble_tool_pool().as_markdown())
173	        return 0
174	    if args.command == 'bootstrap-graph':
175	        print(build_bootstrap_graph().as_markdown())
176	        return 0
177	    if args.command == 'subsystems':
178	        for subsystem in manifest.top_level_modules[: args.limit]:
179	            print(f'{subsystem.name}\t{subsystem.file_count}\t{subsystem.notes}')
180	        return 0
181	    if args.command == 'commands':
182	        if args.query:
183	            print(render_command_index(limit=args.limit, query=args.query))
184	        else:
185	            commands = get_commands(include_plugin_commands=not args.no_plugin_commands, include_skill_commands=not args.no_skill_commands)
186	            output_lines = [f'Command entries: {len(commands)}', '']
187	            output_lines.extend(f'- {module.name} — {module.source_hint}' for module in commands[: args.limit])
188	            print('\n'.join(output_lines))
189	        return 0
190	    if args.command == 'tools':
191	        if args.query:
192	            print(render_tool_index(limit=args.limit, query=args.query))
193	        else:
194	            permission_context = ToolPermissionContext.from_iterables(args.deny_tool, args.deny_prefix)
195	            tools = get_tools(simple_mode=args.simple_mode, include_mcp=not args.no_mcp, permission_context=permission_context)
196	            output_lines = [f'Tool entries: {len(tools)}', '']
197	            output_lines.extend(f'- {module.name} — {module.source_hint}' for module in tools[: args.limit])
198	            print('\n'.join(output_lines))
199	        return 0

201	        matches = PortRuntime().route_prompt(args.prompt, limit=args.limit)
202	        if not matches:
203	            print('No mirrored command/tool matches found.')
204	            return 0
205	        for match in matches:
206	            print(f'{match.kind}\t{match.name}\t{match.score}\t{match.source_hint}')
207	        return 0
208	    if args.command == 'bootstrap':

213	        for idx, result in enumerate(results, start=1):
